features.featureTitle: Update InvoicePrintView to remove the 'Amount Paid' and 'Pending Amount' fields from the printed invoice. Only the Final Amount (and its amount-in-words line) should appear in the GST summary section of the print layout. Do not change any other structural or content elements of the invoice (line items table, GST breakdown rows for Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off, company header, party details, footer).

Improve the visual design and aesthetics of the printed invoice in InvoicePrintView. Enhance layout polish, typography hierarchy, spacing, and overall professional appearance while strictly preserving the existing red-and-white color theme (red header band, white body, red accent borders on GST summary table, red typography for 'MANISH INFRATECH', MI logo in top-left). No structural column changes are permitted.

Redesign the SimpleLoginScreen component with an improved, professional, and visually appealing aesthetic. The redesign must use the existing brand colors (red and white, optionally with navy accents), display the MI logo and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding prominently, and present the username and PIN input fields in a clean, well-spaced card layout. The hardcoded credentials (username: MANISHINFRATECH, PIN: 1752), inline error display, localStorage session storage behavior, and all authentication logic must remain completely unchanged.
